title: Instamojo International Enterprises is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Instamojo International Enterprises is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Instamojo International Enterprises is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Jodhpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Instamojo International Enterprises:
Instamojo International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Instamojo International Enterprises!
